Hw12
  • Premium Contacts API Documentation
  • View page source

Premium Contacts API Documentation

Welcome to the Premium Contacts API documentation! This project is a FastAPI-based RESTful service for managing professional contacts, complete with user authentication, RBAC roles, and Redis caching.

Modules Introduction

Main Application (Endpoints)

async main.confirm_email(token: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db))[source]
main.create_new_contact(contact: ContactCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]
main.delete_existing_contact(contact_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]
main.get_birthdays(db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]
async main.login(form_data: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm = Depends(OAuth2PasswordRequestForm), db: Session = Depends(get_db))[source]
main.read_contacts(skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]
main.read_root()[source]
main.read_single_contact(contact_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]
async main.read_users_me(request: Request, current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]
async main.register(user: UserCreate, request: Request, db: Session = Depends(get_db))[source]
async main.request_password_reset(body: RequestEmail, request: Request, db: Session = Depends(get_db))[source]
async main.reset_password(body: ResetPassword, db: Session = Depends(get_db))[source]
main.search_for_contacts(query: str = Query(PydanticUndefined), db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]
async main.seed_contacts(count: int = Query(100), db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]

Generates random contacts for the currently logged-in user.

async main.update_avatar(file: UploadFile = File(PydanticUndefined), current_user: User = Depends(RoleChecker), db: Session = Depends(get_db))[source]
main.update_existing_contact(contact_id: int, contact: ContactUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))[source]

Authentication & Security

class auth.RoleChecker(allowed_roles: list[str])[source]

Bases: object

auth.create_access_token(data: dict)[source]
async auth.get_current_user(token: str = Depends(OAuth2PasswordBearer), db: Session = Depends(get_db))[source]
auth.get_password_hash(password)[source]
auth.verify_password(plain_password, hashed_password)[source]

CRUD Operations (Database Logic)

crud.create_contact(db: Session, contact: ContactCreate, user: User) → Contact[source]

Create a new contact record linked to the authenticated user.

Parameters:

  • db (Session) – The database session instance.

  • contact (ContactCreate) – The schema containing validated creation data.

  • user (models.User) – The currently authenticated user.

Returns:

The newly created Contact object from the database.

Return type:

Contact

crud.delete_contact(db: Session, contact_id: int, user: User) → Contact | None[source]

Delete a contact record from the database, enforcing user ownership.

Parameters:

  • db (Session) – The database session instance.

  • contact_id (int) – The identifier of the contact to delete.

  • user (models.User) – The currently authenticated user.

Returns:

The deleted Contact instance if successful, or None if access denied/not found.

Return type:

Optional[Contact]

crud.get_contact(db: Session, contact_id: int, user: User) → Contact | None[source]

Retrieve a single contact by its ID, ensuring it belongs to the authenticated user.

Parameters:

  • db (Session) – The database session instance.

  • contact_id (int) – The unique identifier of the contact.

  • user (models.User) – The currently authenticated user.

Returns:

The Contact model if found and owned by the user, else None.

Return type:

Optional[Contact]

crud.get_contacts(db: Session, user: User, skip: int = 0, limit: int = 100) → List[Contact][source]

Retrieve a list of contacts belonging to a specific user with pagination.

Parameters:

  • db (Session) – The database session instance.

  • user (models.User) – The currently authenticated user.

  • skip (int) – Number of records to skip (for pagination), defaults to 0.

  • limit (int) – Maximum number of records to return, defaults to 100.

Returns:

A list of Contact database models.

Return type:

List[Contact]

crud.get_upcoming_birthdays(db: Session, user: User) → List[Contact][source]

Fetch all contacts whose birthdays occur within the next 7 days.

Parameters:

  • db (Session) – The database session instance.

  • user (models.User) – The currently authenticated user.

Returns:

A list of contacts with upcoming birthdays.

Return type:

List[Contact]

crud.search_contacts(db: Session, query: str, user: User) → List[Contact][source]

Search contacts by first name, last name, or email matching a substring case-insensitively.

Parameters:

  • db (Session) – The database session instance.

  • query (str) – The search query string.

  • user (models.User) – The currently authenticated user.

Returns:

A list of matching Contact records.

Return type:

List[Contact]

crud.update_contact(db: Session, contact_id: int, contact: ContactUpdate, user: User) → Contact | None[source]

Perform a partial update (PATCH) on an existing contact record if owned by the user.

Parameters:

  • db (Session) – The database session instance.

  • contact_id (int) – The unique identifier of the contact to update.

  • contact (ContactUpdate) – The schema containing fields to update.

  • user (models.User) – The currently authenticated user.

Returns:

The updated Contact instance, or None if not found.

Return type:

Optional[Contact]
